sentences.arabic: نَسِيَ الطِّفْلُ التَّابْلِيتَ عَلَى الطَّاوِلَةِ وَخَرَجَ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je zaboravilo tablet na stolu i izašlo.
sentences.translationEn: The child forgot the tablet on the table and went out.

sentences.arabic: أَغْلَقَتِ الْأُمُّ التَّابْلِيتَ وَوَضَعَتْهُ فِي الرَّفِّ.
sentences.translation: Majka je ugasila tablet i stavila ga na policu.
sentences.translationEn: The mother turned off the tablet and placed it on the shelf.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ رَجَعَ الطِّفْلُ بَحَثَ عَنِ التَّابْلِيتِ.
sentences.translation: Kad se dijete vratilo tražilo je tablet.
sentences.translationEn: When the child returned he looked for the tablet.

sentences.translation: Majka mu je rekla gdje je i on joj zahvalio.
sentences.translationEn: The mother told him where it was and he thanked her.
